disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive loss of sexual desire and interest over roughly the past year
trigger_question_examples: Tell me what's been going on for you.
Have you noticed any change in your interest in sex or intimacy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My sex drive has just disappeared over the last year — I've got no interest at all, and that's not like me.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Loss of spontaneous early-morning erections and erectile difficulty
trigger_question_examples: Do you still wake with morning erections?
Have you had any changes with erections?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you ask — I don't get those morning erections anymore, and things haven't been working like they used to.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: That's pretty embarrassing to talk about, to be honest.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound fatigue, reduced vitality and a sense of losing muscle bulk and physical strength
trigger_question_examples: How has your energy and strength been?
Have you noticed changes in your body or stamina?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm exhausted all the time and I feel like my muscles are wasting — I'm weaker than I've ever been even though I'm eating normally.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Low, dark mood and increased irritability, culminating in an acute emotional breakdown tonight
trigger_question_examples: How has your mood been through all of this?
What happened tonight that made you reach out now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My mood has been really dark and I've been snapping at everyone — tonight I just fell apart and couldn't stop.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: On direct, sensitive questioning the patient denies any current thoughts of self-harm, suicide or feeling unsafe
trigger_question_examples: When people feel this low, they sometimes have thoughts of harming themselves or that life isn't worth living — have you had any thoughts like that?
Do you feel safe right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No — I've felt hopeless but I haven't had any thoughts of hurting myself, and I do feel safe with my wife here.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Reduced frequency of shaving / patient's own sense of slower facial-hair growth
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any change in how often you need to shave, or in body hair?
Is your beard or body hair growing more slowly than it used to?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, I've been shaving way less often — my beard just doesn't grow like it did.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No cold intolerance, coarse dry hair, snoring or heavy daytime sleepiness reported
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel the cold more than you used to, or notice loud snoring and daytime sleepiness?
Has anyone told you that you snore or stop breathing in your sleep, or do you doze off during the day?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't feel especially cold, and no one's mentioned snoring or me nodding off in the day.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Not currently taking any regular prescription medicines, opioids, anabolic steroids or recreational drugs
trigger_question_examples: Are you on any regular medicines, supplements, steroids or other substances?
Do you use any gym supplements, testosterone boosters or recreational drugs?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No regular medicines at all, and nothing like steroids or drugs.
